svg.title: Graphify Pipeline and Dual-Path Retrieval
svg.desc: How Graphify extracts graph entities from memories and how vector and graph retrieval combine
svg.text: Graphify pipeline — runs after every memory write
What Graphify extracts from a single memory chunk
Full node and relationship type catalog
Dual-path retrieval — vector and graph combined on every query

g.text: vector memories + graph context · token-budgeted · injected

svg.text: Vector answers: what is semantically similar to this query
Graph answers: what is structurally related, who is involved, what decisions depend on this
